Name: Run mabl tests
Description: Trigger specific application or environment plans in mabl.

Parameters.Name: mablApiKey
Parameters.Label: mabl Integration Key
Parameters.HelpText: (Required) The API key of your workspace. You can find the API key on the Settings/API page.

Parameters.Name: mablEnvId
Parameters.Label: Environment ID
Parameters.HelpText: The environment ID to run the tests in. Note that either an environment ID or an application ID must be provided.

Parameters.Name: mablAppId
Parameters.Label: Application ID
Parameters.HelpText: The application ID to run tests on. Note that either an environment ID or an application ID must be provided.

Parameters.Name: mablPlanLabels
Parameters.Label: Plan Labels
Parameters.HelpText: (Optional) A comma-separated list of plan labels. Plans with any of the labels will be executed.

Parameters.Name: mablBranch
Parameters.Label: Test Branch
Parameters.HelpText: (Optional) The mabl branch to run test against.

Parameters.Name: mablAwaitCompletion
Parameters.Label: Await Completion
Parameters.HelpText: When checked, the step will wait for all triggered tests to complete.
